chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.251 of 2024 Town Municipal Corporation Ibrahim Hyderi Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 1486/24 Dated: 17.01.2025 None present for the appellant. -.-.- It seems that on the last two dates counsel for the petitioner has remained absent for one reason or the other and today is the third date of hearing when he is not in attendance. There is no intimation either. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
